58.reason: The loop should start from i=1 to include the digit at index 1; starting at i=2 skips it.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop should start from i=1 to include the digit at index 1; starting at i=2 skips it.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  should start at i=1 to print digits before decimal except first digit
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop should start from i=1 to include the second digit before the decimal point, otherwise it is skipped in the output]

7.reason: [In C89/C90 standard, all variables must be declared at the beginning of the block before any executable statements. Declaring 'i' after 'gets(num);' causes a compilation error on strict compilers.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [In C89/C90 standard, all variables must be declared at the beginning of the block before any executable statements. Declaring 'i' after 'gets(num);' causes a compilation error on strict compilers.]

6.reason: [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers that remove gets() from stdio.h]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers that remove gets() from stdio.h]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors with modern compilers.]
